channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping of mattress outside columbine way, 6th June
item.description:
Is a fire risk and an obstacle for people and vehicles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conington Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation, 6th June
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Layzell Walk, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass too high, 6th June
item.description:
Grass has not been cut for a while in this street, while in the main one all is fine This is definitely not good as rodents can be seen around it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Globe Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned with flat tyres and no MOT for 1+ year, 6th June
item.description:
This car has been abandoned on the road with no MOT for over a year. Mot expired in November 2025. Taking valuable local parking space
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning in Blandford Avenue (o/s 11), 6th June
item.description:
Tree needs pruning as it is beginning to block pathway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Avenue, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rough sleeping and drug use in a community centre, 6th June
item.description:
Very very bad

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecilia Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal poles on path, 6th June
item.description:
Been here for a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tent is back in Crossway Park, 6th June
item.description:
Same occupants. Same issue with rubbish and excrement. They pitch up once they know Peabody have finished for the week. No doubt they will pack up tent between the hours of 9am and 5pm - storing it at 16 Haldane - so Peabody can’t enforce a TORT. Please take action to remove them from the area permanently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayliss Avenue, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 6th June
item.description:
On the corner of Spurstowe Road and Marcon place business fly tip again. I have made a formal complaint via the website to report this business

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marcon Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie bins blocking pavement, 6th June
item.description:
The wheelie bins are constantly blocking the pavement. They belong to 2 Maximfeldt Road and as you can see from enclosed photo they put a vehicle on the drive and leave the bins on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maximfeldt Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and other element left in the street, 6th June
item.description:
There's a mattress and another element, that seems to be like a part of a sofa, in the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on side of road, 6th June
item.description:
Litter on side of road needs clearing please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Circular Road, Little Ilford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of building waste at Arbor Court, 6th June
item.description:
A plumbing company illegally dumped building waste at Arbor Court at around 5pm on Friday 5th June. I know exactly who did this. Contact me for the information.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queen Elizabeths Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation/trees overhanging and surrounding front of 33 Anerley Hill, London SE19 2BA, 6th June
item.description:
Between bus stop and front of 33 Anerley Hill, SE19 2BA - Trees/vegatation is surrounding and over hanging the front of 33 Anerley Hill, London SE19 2BA. Needs to be removed as damaging fencing and side of property. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 43 kilburn high road NW6 5sb, 6th June
item.description:
Tags on letterbox, and on walls outside no. 43 and some felt tip pen writing on wall between 43 and 45

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need pruning lower down as obsecuring vision, 6th June
item.description:
The public trees along the road are overgrown at the base and are now making it really difficult to see when coming in and out of driveways. Particularly reporting outside property number 154/152. This has been ongoing since spring.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor resurfacing and noisy drain cover, 6th June
item.description:
Road resurfacing complete in Chelsfield Road last week is of poor quality as per attached photos. It is an eyesore, already looks like it is breaking up and not of equal standard to the resurfacing done around it. The drain cover is very noisy when cars drive over it, disturbing sleep and being extremely annoying.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Chelsfield Road, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overgrown, 6th June
item.description:
Can’t see kerb for parking, blocking footpath, needs cut back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 6th June
item.description:
There is an office type chair and a window frame with glass on the Communal Green opposite 37/39 CHURCHBURY ROAD SE9 5HU.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Churchbury Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous metal plate, 6th June
item.description:
Someone has removed the bollard and now the metal plate is bent upwards presenting a hazard. I nearly came off my bike when I went over it last night. Please fix asap as this is seriously dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmington Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
